source_text: 1918. The sounds of that battle still haunt me to this day.
translated_text: 1918. Zvuky tej bitky ma prenasledujú dodnes.

source_text: Machine gun fire from enemy lines.
The sickening sound of a bayonet tearing through human flesh.
translated_text: Nechutný zvuk bajonetu trhajúceho ľudské mäso.

source_text: A soldier next to me firing his sidearm in desperation.
translated_text: Vojak vedľa mňa v zúfalstve strieľal zo svojej zbrane.

source_text: All these sounds still echo in my mind
translated_text: Všetky tieto zvuky mi stále znejú v mysli

source_text: and is conducted by death himself.
It all comes together as music.
translated_text: To všetko sa spája ako hudba.
